steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0009, t0010, t0011 are completed and assets are available.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure including assets/library/ and assets/predictions/.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review t0002 ReAct/Plan-and-Solve/Xiong2024 summaries to ground the harness design.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: deps cover the necessary literature; no new external info needed.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0006/t0007/t0010/t0011 library APIs and the v2 dataset schema.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan the harness, compute breakdown of cost vs $20 budget cap, enumerate phase walk.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: Anthropic API only, no remote compute needed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Build phase2_smoke_harness_v1, run all rows × 3 conditions, compute metrics.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were used.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: smoke test directionality is the explicit goal; defer creative ablations to follow-up suggestions.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json (3 variants), images/ charts.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare A's task_success_rate against published ReAct/FrontierMath performance bands.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions: multi-provider replication, confirmatory N expansion.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task complete, prepare PR.
